**Failure Summary:**
- **File:** tests/tui/test_run_table.py - **Test:** TestRunDataTableRowValues::test_row_to_values_basic - **Line:** 97 - **Error:** AssertionError - Expected 7 values but got 8
The test expects `_row_to_values()` to return 7 columns (run_id, status, submitted, workflow, pr, title, chks) but it's currently returning 8 values. This indicates a column has been added to the RunDataTable output (likely the branch name column based on the context of "Enhance Runs Tab - Branch Names, j/k Nav, Detail View"). </output>
